next_steps: Send CSF for Angiostrongylus cantonensis PCR
Send serum and CSF for parasite-specific antibody testing (e.g., Angiostrongylus, Gnathostoma)
Obtain MRI of the brain and spine with gadolinium contrast
Send CSF for TB PCR and fungal culture
Send CSF for autoimmune encephalitis antibody panel
Consult infectious disease and neurology specialists
